frontmatter_compliance.notes: All required fields present, valid semver, no angle brackets. Non-standard field 'disable-model-invocation: true' at L4 (intentional but undocumented in frontmatter-spec). Description 201 chars (1 over target, within 1024 ceiling). shared_read uses wildcard ['*'].

description_quality.notes: Action verb (Audits), declares dispatch model, states pipeline position. Lacks user-facing keyword variants — appropriate since skill is intentionally not user-invocable.

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 179 lines / ~1111 words. Single reference (pact-setup.md, 142 lines) linked at L170 with when-to-read guidance.

instruction_clarity.notes: Numbered Process steps 1-8 with imperative voice and Check: bullets. Explains WHY ('#1 cause of field-naming drift', 'unique value the auditor provides that qe-agent cannot'). Severity Guidelines explicit.

coordination.notes: Read-only correctly declared. Coordination Rules distinguish auditor vs qe-agent (static vs runtime) and vs contract-author (verify vs generate). composes_with all resolve. spawned_by [orchestrator] accurate.

completeness.notes: pact-setup.md reference exists. Inline audit report template at L138-159. Severity guidelines bounded. Inputs (contracts/, agent_ownership, tech_stack, service_map) enumerated upfront.

anti_patterns.notes: Rare explicit 'when NOT to act' rules: Read-only, Contract is truth, flag ambiguities. No hardcoded paths (uses placeholders). Grep commands use realistic --include flags.

important.item: Non-standard frontmatter field 'disable-model-invocation' not documented in frontmatter-spec
important.fix: Either add to frontmatter-spec.md as a house extension or remove the field and rely on the description signal alone.

nits.item: Description is 201 chars — just over 200-char target
nits.fix: Remove redundant 'Composed by orchestrator during multi-agent builds.' sentence.

nits.item: description uses quoted single-line string instead of multiline | block scalar
nits.fix: Convert to | block scalar for consistency with other skills.

nits.item: Field order drift: disable-model-invocation between version and description
nits.fix: Move to between min_plan and owns if field is kept.

top_fixes.fix: Document or remove the non-standard disable-model-invocation frontmatter field
Replace owns.shared_read wildcard with explicit directory list
Trim description to under 200 chars by removing redundant sentence
